'''Yartiv''' was a red [[Star/Legends|star]], the primary of the [[Yartiv system|Yartiv]] [[Star system/Legends|system]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The system also contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Trinta]],

{{Star-stub}}

*''[[Domain of Evil]]'' {{Reprint|Domain of Evil}}
